events.title: Comedy Allstars
events.description: Rotating lineup of Bay Area's best comics in Punch Line's classic Tuesday showcase format.

events.title: Scott Capurro Has Friends
events.description: Scott Capurro — veteran SF comedian, sharp and unapologetic — brings a hand-picked lineup of guests.

events.title: Zach Noe Towers
events.description: Stand-up comedian and TikTok personality known for character-driven comedy and storytelling.

events.title: SF Comedy Showcase
events.description: Sunday showcase mixing established and emerging Bay Area stand-up comics.

events.title: BATS Improv: Whodunnit?
events.description: Mystery-themed improvised show from BATS Improv — one of SF's longest-running improv companies. The crime, suspects, and solution are all made up on the spot.

events.title: Glass Girl, Dream Arenas, Dalmatia
events.description: Three-band indie rock lineup at one of SF's best small venues. Doors 7:30 PM.

events.title: Benny La Mar, Laurin Hunter, Max Fees
events.description: Eclectic mid-week lineup. Doors 8 PM.

events.title: Dark Meta Railroad, Plaster, Freak Nature Puppets
events.description: Thursday indie/experimental rock. Doors 8 PM.

events.title: Cocker Power, Fantasy, Latitude
events.description: Saturday night indie rock showcase. Doors 7 PM.

events.title: Cowboy Beauty Queen, Preschool, Spleens
events.description: Sunday indie rock to close out the weekend. Doors 7:30 PM.

events.title: Aperture 2026 Arts Festival
events.description: Multidisciplinary festival showcasing emerging Asian Pacific American artists — visual art, performance, music, and literature across SF venues through June 28. Check aperture2026.org for venue map.

events.title: Creativity Explored — 'Down the Hills and Around the Bends' Opening
events.description: New group exhibition opening at Creativity Explored (3245 16th St) — studio artists using cultural iconography to map daily life and experience, curated by Tom Leach. Runs through August 22. Gallery hours Thu–Fri 3–6 PM, Sat noon–5 PM.

events.title: STUDIO Gallery Opening — Julia Foug, Robert Frank & Mila Kirillova
events.description: Opening reception 3–5 PM for three concurrent solo shows. Part of a six-solo + group exhibition running June 17–July 10.

events.title: VIOLET: Art x Tech — Iris Wong
events.description: Multimedia solo show exploring human relationships with AI through digital collage and written correspondence with AI systems. Opening weekend June 27–28; interactive installations included.

events.title: The Artists Gallery — Artist Talk
events.description: Artist talk tied to the current six-solo exhibition (runs Jun 17–Jul 10). Check TAG's website for exact time.

events.title: Dance Fridays — Salsa & Bachata Night
events.description: SF's largest Latin dance social — salsa in the main room, bachata in room 2. Dance lessons included before the social. Every Friday 7:45 PM–1:30 AM at 550 Barneveld Ave.

events.title: Sensual Soiree — Bachata & Kizomba Night
events.description: Weekly Wednesday bachata and kizomba social at Paname SF (523 Broadway). Lesson from 8–9 PM, social dancing until late. Welcoming to all levels.

events.title: Bachata Lab — Weekly Friday Social
events.description: Weekly Friday bachata social with lesson + dancing at 1830 17th St. All levels welcome. Repeats every Friday.

events.title: Bachata Takeover
events.description: Saturday bachata takeover at Golden City Dance Collective. Lesson + social format, repeats weekly on Saturdays.

events.title: Club Puertorriqueno — Sunday Latin Dance Social
events.description: Weekly Sunday Latin dance social at 3249A Mission St (2nd floor) — salsa, cumbia, merengue in a lively community setting. One of SF's most authentic spots.

events.title: Bachata in North Beach — Special Edition
events.description: Special bachata event at Broadway Studios (435 Broadway). Lesson + social, all levels welcome.

events.title: Royal Cuckoo — Nightly Hammond Organ Jazz
events.description: Hammond organ jazz nightly — Chris Siebert holds court most evenings, Lavay Smith joins Sundays. Open 7 nights/week, doors 4 PM, music from 8 PM. Cozy Mission saloon with a lineage dating to 1881. No cover, ever.
